text_block_list.text: One afternoon...
Dun cha cha, dun cha...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh... What a fun little tune.

What d'ya mean "little"?! This is the rhythm of the
sun that courses through my veins!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wonder! Amazement! Surprise! El Condor Pasa
takes the stage!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, I thought that might be you, El Condor Pa—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, a dance floor ministered by angels on high!
A dance to warm your very soul shall soon
commence!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's more?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Non non! It's not over yet! Free your soul with this
innovative contemporary dance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! The free-for-all dance match is about to
begin! Start dancing or you lose!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe you wanna watch from the sidelines? I
guess that's one way to live.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna lose by default, I'll just soar away.
Hasta luego! ☆

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? Like I would lose without a fight!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
H-hold it! I'll show you first-rate dance skills
cultivated over years of effort!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! There's the King I know! Her indomitable
spirit is alive and well!
Dun cha cha, dun cha...
...Cha cha... dun...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? There's no one here... Was that all... a
dream?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I must've been really tired to have such an odd dream.
Dun cha cha, dun cha...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now it's stuck in my head...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why am I still hearing it?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Could I have gained some special psychic sense?
But if that's the case...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What on earth have I opened my mind up to?!

King Halo's running over the next few days
becomes even more rhythmic and smooth.
